name: 16.5"x13" Turned Ceramic Table Lamp White - Threshold™: Modern Accent, Linen Shade, No Assembly Required
description:
Light up any space with this White Turned Ceramic Table Lamp from Threshold™. This ceramic table lamp base makes a great addition to your indoor lighting. It features a white base with a turned textured effect, and a matching empire shade to finish off the fresh look. This simple table lamp comes with a simple on/off switch for effortless illumination. Place it on a side table in your living room, lounge room or on the console table for endless display potential around your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Height: 17 Inches
Overall Width: 13 Inches
Lamp Base diameter: 7 Inches
Lamp Shade Top diameter: 7.56 inches
Lamp Shade Bottom diameter: 13 Inches
Lamp Shade Height: 8 inches
